description: CompositionHalf sleeve shirt made of 100%, with blue, grey and white checks,  navy blue stitch detailing, tape and light blue panel on the in-seam of the collar, patch pockets on the chest with buttoned flaps, flaps on the shoulders, full length buttoned placket with white buttons and one xnap button at the end and curved hemlineFittingSlimWash care Machine wash at 40 degree C Wash dark colours separately Do not bleach Tumble dry on normal or line dry Warm iron Get ready to take casual dressing to the next level with this blue, grey and white check shirt from locomotive. The cool cotton fabric keeps you fresh all day while you hang out with your friends. This shirt can be teamed with low slung jeans and canvas shoes for a laidback look.Model statisticsThe model wears size M in t-shirtsHeight-6', Shoulders-18"
